name: alloydb-omni
description: Create, connect, and interact with an AlloyDB Omni database and data.

ALLOYDB_OMNI_HOST.title: Host
ALLOYDB_OMNI_HOST.description: (Optional) Host of the AlloyDB Omni instance. localhost by default.

ALLOYDB_OMNI_PORT.title: Port
ALLOYDB_OMNI_PORT.description: (Optional) Port of the AlloyDB Omni instance. 5432 by default

ALLOYDB_OMNI_DATABASE.title: Database
ALLOYDB_OMNI_DATABASE.description: Name of the database to be connected to
